def walk(root: dict[str, object]) -> int:
    stack = [root]
    seen: set[int] = set()
    total = 0
    while stack:
        node = stack.pop()
        marker = id(node)
        if marker in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(marker)
        total += 1
        stack.extend(node.get("children", []))
    return total
